headline: Keurig Dr Pepper Reaffirms FY26 Guidance Amid Important Leadership Change
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 2.83%, Keurig Dr Pepper (NASDAQ:KDP) is included among the 12 Best NASDAQ Stocks to Buy for Dividends. Keurig Dr Pepper (NASDAQ:KDP) is a leading beverage company in North America.
